summary: Well‑played show featuring Brent’s rare first “Casey Jones”, though recording details are unknown.
review: The performance is praised as solid from start to finish, highlighted by Brent Mydland’s debut on the seldom‑performed ‘Casey Jones’. Reviewers note no issues with the music but give no information about the audio source or its clarity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on sound quality, clarity, or source type.
